---
title: "The Word and the Work, or, The Harmony of Scripture with Geological Discoveries"
---

## The Word and the Work, or, The Harmony of Scripture with Geological Discoveries

**Author:** Elizabeth Redgrave
**Date:** 1860
**Imprint:** London: Mozley

### Notes

This work was described in \'Hints on Reading\', <i>MP</i> (January 1860), 111, as \'a series of conversations between a clergyman and a mechanic, intended to popularize Hugh Miller\'s views of the Periods of Creation, and to show how they may be reconciled with the Scriptural narrative.\'

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
